prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, medium cinematic shot; Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, confidently approaches Ari Oakspire, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash. Mira hands a ribboned commission document to Ari. Bright, polished anime aesthetic, bustling guild background, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ari Oakspire accepts the signed commission from Mira Ledgerfall. Ari smiles, opens his ledger tablet, and cross-references the document with his inventory records, nodding in professional agreement to finalize the guild resource request. Consistent lighting, camera, and character appearance, no text, no watermark.
